creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to software from comment #13)
> Created attachment 174654 [details]
> /usr/local/share/xml/catalog.ports

I'm not really pro in this xml catalog stuff, but my guess is that this entry is bogus as it refers the file itself, causing all these errors:

<nextCatalog catalog="/usr/local/share/xml/catalog.ports" />

Try backing up the file and removing this entry.
